topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into MQTT. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for IoT Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: MQTT is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing MQTT in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given MQTT snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of MQTT?
How does MQTT handle memory management?
